title: Survival Realm Season 8
description: Modpack for Survival Realm Season 8, it is mostly QoL mods but it also has some extra trims.
body:
A modpack for the Survival Season 8 Server. It has extra QoL mods and some extra trims.

It does include Simple Voice Chat, if you want to speak to people on the server you are playing on (the server will need the mod/plugin installed server-side as well)
